intent: Deploy and run COAX Federated Execution via API + Bridge so Claude and Perplexity respond programmatically and all outputs are logged automatically.

tasks.prompt: Market demand, competitors, risks, pricing signals, and proof sources for a federated COAX Chief of Staff system coordinating GPT, Claude, and Perplexity via API + Bridge. Return structured JSON with sources when available.
Design the COAX federated operating model, governance, message contracts, failure handling, and productisation path. Return structured JSON with decisions, actions, risks, and proof requirements.
Normalise returned Claude and Perplexity outputs into one action register, Reality Ledger entry, GitHub proof file, and Command Centre status.

proof_gate.REAL: Claude and Perplexity both respond through API, outputs are written to GitHub, Supabase rows exist, merged proof exists.
proof_gate.PARTIAL: Handoff exists but one or more external execution proofs are missing.
